vocab.meaning: sự thưởng thức vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Visiting a gallery heightens your aesthetic appreciation for how light and shadow interact on a canvas.

vocab.meaning: những nét vẽ đầy sức sống/mạnh mẽ
vocab.example: I was particularly captivated by the vibrant brushstrokes used in the Impressionist wing.

vocab.meaning: một bộ sưu tập được tuyển chọn kỹ lưỡng
vocab.example: The gallery featured a curated selection of sculptures that reflected the city's industrial history.
Some of the avant-garde installations were a bit perplexing, yet they certainly pushed the boundaries of traditional art.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản hoàn toàn/gay gắt
vocab.example: The black-and-white photography wing stood in stark contrast to the colorful pop art display next door.

vocab.meaning: sự đắm mình vào văn hóa
vocab.example: Galleries offer a form of cultural immersion that helps you understand the social issues of a specific era.

vocab.meaning: sức mạnh khơi gợi (cảm xúc/kỷ niệm)
vocab.example: I was surprised by the evocative power of a simple landscape painting; it reminded me of my childhood home.

vocab.meaning: những chi tiết tinh xảo/phức tạp
vocab.example: You need to stand quite close to those ancient tapestries to fully grasp the intricate details of the weaving.
The exhibition explored how digital tools have become a legitimate artistic medium in the 21st century.
Seeing the original sketches allowed me to appreciate the artist's enduring legacy in the world of modern design.
